GRP-LZ-PREPROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin
GRP-LZ-PREPROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.description: Dedicated team to manage ExaDB-C@C db layer in proj1, preprod environment.

GRP-LZ-PROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-proj1-exacc-admin
GRP-LZ-PROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.description: Dedicated team to manage ExaDB-C@C db layer in proj1, prod environment.

PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-DB-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-global-exacc-db-admin
PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-DB-ADMIN-KEY.description: Policy which allows the group grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin to manage databases in all ExaDB-C@C db compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage data-safe-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-landingzone where all{sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin')), request.operation !='ValidateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='ActivateExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='ChangeExadataInfrastructureCompartment',request.operation !='AddStorageCapacityExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='UpdateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='DeleteVmClusterNetwork'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to use vmclusters in compartment cmp-landingzone where all{sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin')), request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_SSH_KEY', request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_CPU',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_MEMORY',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_LOCAL_STORAGE',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_FILE_SYSTEM'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage backups in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage database-software-image in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage db-homes in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage databases in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage pluggable-databases in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-GENERIC-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-global-exacc-generic
PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-GENERIC-ADMIN-KEY.description: Policy which allows the groups grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin and grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin to have shared privileges in all ExaDB-C@C compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to use cloud-shell in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to read compartments in tenancy

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage alarms in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage metrics in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to read audit-events in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to read work-requests in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin','id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-db-admin' to manage ons-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-admin'))

PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-INFRA-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin
PCY-LZ-GLOBAL-EXACC-INFRA-ADMIN-KEY.description: Policy which allows the grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin group users to manage the ExaDB-C@C infra in all ExaDB-C@C infra compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage scheduling-policies in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage scheduling-windows in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage execution-windows in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-infra-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage vmclusters in compartment cmp-landingzone where all{sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin')), request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_GI_SOFTWARE', request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_EXADATA_STORAGE'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to use dbServers in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage dbnode-console-connection in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage dbnode-console-history in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-exacc-db-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to use subnets in compartment cmp-landingzone  where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-global-exacc-infra-admin' to use dns in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

PCY-LZ-PREPROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-preprod-exacc-proj1-admin
PCY-LZ-PREPROD-EXACC-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.description: Policy which allows the grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin group users to manage the autonomous database layer in proj1.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage alarms in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage metrics in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to read audit-events in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to read work-requests in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage ons-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-exacc-admin' to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1-db
